default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena to discuss content strategy, performance, and SEO improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pipeline adjustments: Balancing between 6-20 pieces/week, aiming for \~10/week](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [SEO focus: Community-related keywords showing impressions but low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Action items: On-page optimization, content enrichment, and exploring off-page SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Performance review: Some content refreshes showing significant improvements in clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Schedule

  - [Current focus: Completing last 5 of 20 pieces on WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Aim to balance between previous 6/week and new 20/week target; settling around 10/week](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Holiday schedule: GrowthX wrapping up Dec 18, Arena team's last day before break is Dec 15](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Content pipeline continues through holidays, meetings paused until Jan 6 return](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### SEO Performance and Strategy

  - [Recent peak in impressions 2 weeks ago, now slowing (potential seasonality/algorithm updates)](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Significant traffic increase from India (Nov 27 - Dec 5)](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Strong performance: "group chat engagement" and "Unavirus Ella Marina" topics](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Community-related keywords: High impressions, low click-through rates (e.g., "social media community management": 300 impressions, 0 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

### Content Optimization Tactics

  - [Enrichment strategy: Custom images, infographics, expert "Our Take" sections, intro rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Adding FAQ sections based on "People Also Ask" and question keywords](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Improving E-A-T: Author bios, LinkedIn credentials, Gravatar implementation](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [Meta description and title optimization for community-related content](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)

### Off-Page SEO Considerations

  - [Discussed link building, digital PR, guest posting, and press releases](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Paulo emphasized need for "different media" approach to combat declining organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### Content Refresh Results

  - [7 batches of 5-article refreshes completed or in progress](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Most batches showing improvements in clicks/impressions (e.g., one with 2,000% increase)](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Batch 5 showing decline, requires investigation](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Upload remaining content pieces by mid-day Dec 15 for Paola to process before break](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Prioritize and begin work on comment system/"Link in Bio" topics (25 suggestions)](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [January priorities: Deploy CRO changes, plan large batch of clustered topics](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Conduct 6-month review meeting on Jan 6](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Andrej to prioritize community articles for content enrichment and on-page optimization](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Arena team to enhance author bios, add LinkedIn links, and implement Gravatar](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Explore off-page SEO strategies (link building, digital PR) in the new year](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Investigate performance decline in refresh batch 5](https://fathom.video/share/FY2xkdA3JVZDkX4a8_xhYe3dyy7pX-t4?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

action_items.description: Upload max possible articles to WordPress by mid-day tomorrow
Prioritize 25 topic suggestions for comment system/link in bio. Run SEMrush, assign keywords, generate content
Prioritize community-related articles for content enrichment. Improve SEO titles, meta descriptions, add FAQs
Add Gravatar and LinkedIn credentials to author bios on blog posts
